title: Add Cart option in the site header (top-right)

requirements.text: Add a Cart option (icon button) to the site header, positioned on the top-right side and visible from all pages. The Cart option must be accessible (screen-reader label) and must not break the existing responsive header behavior (desktop nav + mobile sheet menu).

quotes: add cart option on top right side

acceptanceCriteria: On desktop widths, a Cart icon/button is visible in the SiteHeader aligned to the right side of the header row.
The Cart option is accessible via keyboard navigation and includes an sr-only label like "Cart".
The existing desktop navigation links (Home/Products/Farms/About/Contact) continue to display and function as before.
On mobile widths, the header continues to show the menu toggle; Cart remains reachable (either as a visible icon in the header or as an item in the mobile sheet menu), and navigation remains usable.

requirements.text: Create a basic Cart page and route so that clicking the Cart option navigates to a dedicated cart screen (e.g., "/cart") with English user-facing text and an empty-state message.

quotes: add cart option on top right side

acceptanceCriteria: Navigating to "/cart" renders a Cart page without errors.
Clicking the header Cart option navigates to "/cart".
The Cart page shows a clear empty-state message in English (e.g., "Your cart is empty.") and fits the existing Farm2Retail visual styling.

constraints: Frontend immutable paths must not be edited: frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.ts, frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.tsx, frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts, frontend/src/main.tsx, frontend/src/components/ui.
nonGoals: Implementing full cart functionality (add/remove items, quantities, totals, checkout, persistence).
Backend APIs or data model changes related to carts.
